text.zh: Actor-Critic 是当前 legacy 展示中的一个 AI 历史节点。
text.en: Actor-Critic is an AI history milestone in the current legacy presentation.

text.zh: Actor-Critic 方法把强化学习分成负责行动的策略组件和负责评估的价值组件。该架构让行为可以借助学习得到的评价来改进，而不必等待完整回报。
text.en: Actor-critic methods split reinforcement learning into a policy component that acts and a value component that evaluates. This architecture made it possible to improve behavior using learned criticism rather than waiting for full returns.
